name: Ptengine
description: Ptminds heatmap + personalization platform — Japans answer to Hotjar/Optimizely with built-in CDP.

seo.title: Ptengine — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Ptengine: Ptminds heatmap + personalization platform — Japans answer to Hotjar/Optimizely with built-in CDP.

when_to_use: Heatmap and personalization combined on Japanese platform
Session analysis correlated with user segment data
A/B testing with built-in audience segmentation

pros: Heatmaps plus personalization in one platform
Built-in CDP reduces need for Segment-like tooling
Strong presence and support in the Japanese market
Personalization rules trigger from heatmap insights
cons: Outside Japan, awareness and community support are thin
CDP is basic compared to real enterprise CDPs
Personalization engine is less mature than Optimizely
Integration ecosystem is narrower than competitors
review.verdict: Decent Japan-focused Hotjar+Optimizely combo with a lightweight CDP, but a niche pick in Western markets.
review.best_for: Teams operating in Japan wanting one tool for heatmaps and personalization.
review.not_for: Enterprises needing a serious CDP or global support footprint.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
